title: DataPartitionFacet
description: Custom OpenLineage facet for data partition information

_producer.description: URI identifying the producer of this facet

_schemaURL.description: URL to the JSON schema for this facet

data_date.description: Single data date for this partition (ISO 8601 format)

data_date_start.description: Start date for date range partitions (ISO 8601 format)

data_date_end.description: End date for date range partitions (ISO 8601 format)

partition_column.description: Name of the column used for partitioning
